# CWE-215 positive: debug logging prints session secret
lang: go
file: CWE-215-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"log"
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

// CWE-215 Insertion of Sensitive Information Into Debugging Code
// Vulnerable line: debug log includes session secret from header.
func DebugSession(c *gin.Context) {
	secret := c.GetHeader("X-Session-Secret")
	log.Printf("session debug secret=%s path=%s", secret, c.Request.URL.Path)
	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"status": "logged"})
}
